1. COMPLIANCE FILING FOR PACKAGED NAMKEEN
All manufacturers of branded packaged namkeen must file Form RW-1 by the 10th day of the following month through the state compliance portal. The filing must include HSN 2106 turnover, batch-wise production volume, and state-wise dispatch details for branded packaged namkeen products sold during the reporting period.

2. APPLICABLE GST RATE
The applicable GST rate for branded packaged namkeen under HSN 2106 is 12 percent. Businesses must calculate outward tax liability at 12 percent and maintain invoice records reflecting the applicable classification and rate for all branded packaged namkeen supplies.

3. PENALTY FOR NON-COMPLIANCE
Where a business fails to submit Form RW-1 by the required deadline, a late filing penalty of Rs. 5,000 shall apply. Continued non-compliance may result in temporary suspension of the filing facility until the declaration is regularized.
